name: Raisin Oat Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Lightly oil 10 muffin cups or spray with a nonstick cooking spray.
3. Place oats in a blender container and blend until it has the consistency of flour.
4. Add baking powder to the blended oats and mix well.
5. Stir in raisins.
6. In a medium bowl, combine milk, lemon juice and let stand for 1 minute.
7. Add remaining ingredients (oil, egg whites, vanilla extract) to the milk mixture and beat until blended.
8. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and mix until all ingredients are moistened.
9. Divide batter evenly among prepared muffin cups.
10. Bake for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
11. Remove muffins from oven and let cool on rack.
